title: CancellationPolicy
description: A policy defining the terms and conditions under which a transport booking can be cancelled, including applicable refund percentages and cancellation deadlines.

cancellationFee.description: Flat cancellation fee charged upon cancellation

gracePeriodMinutes.description: Number of minutes after booking during which cancellation is free

fareComponent.description: Fare components affected by this cancellation policy

id.description: Unique identifier for the cancellation policy

refundPercentage.description: Percentage of the fare refunded on cancellation

cancelByTime.description: Deadline by which cancellation must be made
